title: How to Setting Up a NOWPayments Digital Store: The Complete Creator Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: USDT, BTC, ETH, SOL, and 300+ coins. Get paid in seconds, convert locally, and keep 100% of your revenue minus network fees.

content.text: If you're a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or other restricted countries, you know the frustration of being blocked by PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad. You've spent hours creating digital products like ebooks, courses, or art, but can't collect payment due to geographic restrictions or banking limitations. It's time to break free from these limitations and start getting paid for your work.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The traditional payment processing systems often fail digital creators in restricted countries due to KYC requirements or geographical limitations. However, with the rise of cryptocurrency and blockchain technology, it's now possible to receive payments without relying on these traditional systems. By using a platform like NOWPayments, you can start accepting crypto payments for your digital products, bypassing the need for PayPal or other restricted platforms.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you start setting up your digital store with NOWPayments, you'll need to have a few things in place. First, you'll need to create a digital wallet to store your cryptocurrency. You'll also need to have a clear understanding of the types of digital products you want to sell and how you'll deliver them to your customers. With these basics in place, you can start building your store and start accepting payments.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

Setting up your payment and delivery pipeline is a crucial step in getting your digital store up and running. You'll need to integrate your digital wallet with your store, and set up a system for automated delivery of your digital products. This can be done using a platform like NOWPayments, which allows you to accept crypto payments and automatically deliver your products to customers. With this system in place, you can start selling your digital products and getting paid in cryptocurrency.
Break free from PayPal restrictions with crypto payments
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and make your first sale. This involves creating a storefront, listing your digital products, and setting prices. You'll also need to test your payment and delivery system to ensure everything is working smoothly. With your store live and your system tested, you can start promoting your products and attracting customers. Before you know it, you'll be making your first sale and getting paid in cryptocurrency.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

As your digital store grows and you start making more sales, you'll need to scale your system to keep up with demand. This may involve upgrading your digital wallet, increasing your storage capacity, or hiring help to manage your store. With a scalable system in place, you can continue to grow your business and increase your earnings. You can also explore new markets and opportunities, such as selling your digital products in different countries or partnering with other creators to expand your offerings.
How do I receive crypto payments for my digital products?

USDT is the most practical starting point for digital product sales because it eliminates price volatility from the equation. Your buyer pays in USDT and you receive USDT — one dollar in equals one dollar received, minus Tron network fees of under one dollar per transaction. You do not need to manage exchange rate risk or time your conversions around market movements. When you are ready to convert to local currency, you use a P2P exchange — Binance P2P is available in most countries, and local exchanges exist in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh with good liquidity. The conversion to naira, cedis, shillings, or rupees takes 20-30 minutes on average. This is a complete, operational path from digital product sale to local currency in your hands.
Automate delivery of digital products with NOWPayments

Your Action Checklist

To get started with setting up your NOWPayments digital store, follow these steps: create a digital wallet to store your cryptocurrency, set up a system for automated delivery of your digital products, integrate your wallet with your store, test your payment and delivery system, create a storefront and list your digital products, and set prices. With these steps complete, you can start selling your digital products and getting paid in cryptocurrency.
